module simd_load16_lane.0.wasm
assert_return v128.load16_lane_0 i32:0 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00010000000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_1 i32:1 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000102000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_2 i32:2 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000020300000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_3 i32:3 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000003040000000000000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_4 i32:4 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000405000000000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_5 i32:5 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000050600000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_6 i32:6 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000006070000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_7 i32:7 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000708
assert_return v128.load16_lane_0_offset_0 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00010000000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_1_offset_1 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000102000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_2_offset_2 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000020300000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_3_offset_3 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000003040000000000000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_4_offset_4 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000405000000000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_5_offset_5 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000050600000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_6_offset_6 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000006070000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_7_offset_7 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000708
assert_return v128.load16_lane_0_align_1 i32:0 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00010000000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_0_align_2 i32:0 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00010000000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_1_align_1 i32:1 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000102000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_1_align_2 i32:1 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000102000000000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_2_align_1 i32:2 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000020300000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_2_align_2 i32:2 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000020300000000000000000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_3_align_1 i32:3 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000003040000000000000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_3_align_2 i32:3 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000003040000000000000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_4_align_1 i32:4 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000405000000000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_4_align_2 i32:4 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000405000000000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_5_align_1 i32:5 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000050600000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_5_align_2 i32:5 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000050600000000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_6_align_1 i32:6 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000006070000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_6_align_2 i32:6 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000006070000
assert_return v128.load16_lane_7_align_1 i32:7 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000708
assert_return v128.load16_lane_7_align_2 i32:7 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000708
assert_invalid simd_load16_lane.1.wasm
assert_invalid simd_load16_lane.2.wasm
assert_invalid simd_load16_lane.3.wasm
